mentions.note: NYC office REIT sold off on AI space demand concerns.

Up 1,800% over 5 years, 250% in 12 months, 40% YTD; pivoted from low-margin highway to high-margin data center site development/electrical; robust Q4 (51% revenue growth, 78% backlog increase); strong guidance (25% revenue, 26% earnings growth); Cramer adding to charitable trust.
